name: Barbara Calhoun Park
description: Barbara Calhoun Park is one of the most popular places to play pickleball in Perry, GA. There are 4 outdoor concrete courts. The lines are overlaid on a tennis court, so the net is a little taller than a normal pickleball net. Players have access to lights. The courts are free.

name: Creekwood Park
description: Come play pickleball at Creekwood Park in Perry, GA! There are 6 outdoor courts. These are dedicated courts with permanent lines and nets. The courts are free.

name: Peavy Park
description: Peavy Park is a place to play pickleball in Warner Robins, GA. There are 2 outdoor courts. The lines are permanent, but you'll need to bring your own net. The courts are free.

name: Robins AFB Main Gym
description: Come play pickleball at Robins AFB Main Gym in Robins Air Force Base, GA! There are 4 outdoor courts. The lines are overlaid on a tennis court, so the net is a little taller than a normal pickleball net. A membership is required to play.

name: Ted Wright Park
description: Ted Wright Park is one of the most popular places to play pickleball in Bonaire, GA. There are 12 outdoor asphalt courts. These are dedicated courts with permanent lines and nets. Amenities include restrooms, water, and lights. The courts are free. You can reserve the courts.

name: Warner Robins Rec Center
description: Come play pickleball at Warner Robins Rec Center in Warner Robins, GA! There are 6 indoor wood courts. The lines are permanent, and portable nets are available. The courts are free. Amenities include lights, wheelchair accessibility, youth programming, restrooms, and locker rooms.
